title: Koeksisters – 2 ingredients
excerpt: Koeksisters – 2 ingredients Spice syrup 400 ml water 750 g sugar 20 ml lemon juice 2 (or more) bruised pieces of ginger 1 stick cinnamon Method cook everything together for 10 minutes place in the fridge for 4 to 6 hours Dough 750 ml self-raising flour 375 ml full cream plain yoghurt …
html:
Koeksisters – 2 ingredients

Spice syrup

  • 400 ml water
  • 750 g sugar
  • 20 ml lemon juice
  • 2 (or more) bruised pieces of ginger
  • 1 stick cinnamon

Method

  1. cook everything together for 10 minutes
  2. place in the fridge for 4 to 6 hours

Dough

  • 750 ml self-raising flour
  • 375 ml full cream plain yoghurt
  • Oil for deep-frying

Method

  1. Mix the flour and the yoghurt until you have a dough
  2. On a floured surface, roll the dough out so it's about 5 mm thick
  3. Cut the dough into strips of 6cm by 1 cm
  4. Plait 3 strips and press the ends firmly together
  5. Heat the oil to 180 degrees and fry the koeksisters until brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and press immediately into the ice-cold syrup. Place on a rack and let the extra syrup drip off.
  6. Keep the syrup cold by keeping it on a bowl of ice.
